rag_rules: Place AGREE contracts inside annex agree {** ... **}; blocks within the appropriate component scope.
Use assume/guarantee/eq/const in component types for interface behavior; use assign in implementations for bindings.
generic_rules: AGREE expressions must reference visible symbols from the component's scope.
Constants and equations should use named values or visible features when available.
Boolean logic in AGREE should combine visible input ports and constants with standard operators.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE syntax includes assume "label": expr;, guarantee "label": expr;, eq name : type = expr;, const name : type = value;, and assign output = expr;.
Component type contracts should avoid subcomponent ports unless represented via variables or outputs.
anti_patterns: Do not place implementation-level assign clauses in component types.
Do not reference AADL properties like Compute_Execution_Time as AGREE variables.
irrelevant_topics: AADL property names as AGREE variables
